infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ReadyBoard uses your camera to photograph work areas as legal evidence for delay documentation.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ReadyBoard records your location to verify which work area you are reporting from.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ReadyBoard needs access to save site photos as evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: ReadyBoard uses your camera to photograph work areas as evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ReadyBoard records your location to verify your work area.
